title: Welcome
description: This is a TanStack Start app with i18next internationalization.
intro: This page demonstrates server-side rendered translations.
aboutDescription: This is the about page. Internationalization is working correctly.
transIntro: The <Trans> component lets you embed JSX — links, bold text, custom components — directly inside your translations.
builtWith: This app is built with <bold>TanStack Start</bold> and powered by <italic>i18next</italic>.
visitDocs: Read the <docsLink>i18next documentation</docsLink> to learn more about rich translations.
